#  Add a User to Projects in Your Company's Procore Account 
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/directory-company/permissions)
  * Before adding an existing user to all of the projects in your company's Procore account, ensure that an appropriate project permissions template is available. See [Create a Project Permission Template](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/permissions-company/tutorials/create-a-project-permissions-template).
  * When added to a project, the user is automatically added to the corresponding Project Directory. If a project doesn't have a Directory, users will not be added to the project.
  * When adding to projects from viewing their profile:
    * You can search by project name, number, or address.
    * 100 projects load per page and you can select projects across multiple pages.
  * The 'Select All Projects' option is available for companies with fewer than 5,000 projects.


##  Steps 
  * From User View
  * From User Edit


### Add a User to Projects from Viewing their Profile
  1. Navigate to the Company level **Directory** tool.
  2. Click **Users**.
  3. Click **View** next to the name of the user you want to add to one or more projects.
  4. Click the **Projects** tab.
  5. Click **Edit Projects**.
  6. _Optional:_ Search for projects by project name, number, address, city, state, zip, and phone number.
  7. _Optional:_ Click **More Filters** and select filters relating to the projects. Then click **Apply**.
  8. Update project assignments:
     * **Add to All Projects**
       1. Click **Add to All Projects**.
       2. Select the **project permission template** to be applied to the selected projects.
       3. _Optional:_ Select the **Project Role**.
       4. Select which projects to assign:
          * **Active Projects**
          * **Inactive Projects**
          * **All Project**
     * **Bulk Update Project Assignments**
       1. Mark the checkboxes for the projects.
       2. Click **Edit**.
       3. Under 'Project Assignment', select **Add**.
       4. _Optional:_ Select the **Project Role**.
       5. Select the **Project Permission Template.**
       6. Click **Apply**.
     * **Update a Single Project Assignment**
       1. Click the field under the 'Project Assignment' column and select **Add**.
       2. Click the field under 'Project Role' column and select their **Project Role**.
       3. Click the the field under the 'Project Permission Template' column and select their **Project Permission Template.**
  9. Click **Next**.
  10. Review the changes, then click **Save.  
**_Note:_ Click **Undo** to remove an unwanted change before clicking save.


### Add a User to Projects from Editing their Profile
  1. Navigate to the Company level **Directory** tool.
  2. Click **Users**.
  3. Click **Edit** next to the name of the user.
  4. _Optional:_ Update any profile information.
  5. Scroll down to the bottom of the page and click **Save and Manage Projects**.
  6. _Optional:_ **Search** for projects by project name, number, address, city, state, zip, and phone number.
  7. _Optional:_ Click **More Filters** and select filters relating to the projects. Then click **Apply**.
  8. Update project assignments:
     * **Add to All Projects**
       1. Click **Add to All Projects**.
       2. Select the **project permission template** to be applied to the selected projects.
       3. _Optional:_ Select the **Project Role.**
       4. Select which projects to assign:
          * **Active Projects**
          * **Inactive Projects**
          * **All Projects**
     * **Bulk Update Project Assignments**
       1. Mark the checkboxes for the projects.
       2. Click **Edit**.
       3. Under 'Project Assignment', select **Add**.
       4. _Optional:_ Select the **Project Role**.
       5. Select the **Project Permission Template.**
       6. Click **Apply**.
     * **Update a Single Project Assignment**
       1. Click the field under the 'Project Assignment' column and select **Add**.
       2. Click the field under 'Project Role' column and select their **Project Role**.
       3. Click the the field under the 'Project Permission Template' column and select their **Project Permission Template.**
  9. Click **Next**.
  10. Review the changes, then click **Save.  
**_Note:_ Click **Undo** or **Back** to remove an unwanted change before clicking save.


#####  Tip
You can also [add a user to future projects](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/directory-company/tutorials/add-a-user-to-future-projects-in-your-company-directory).
## See Also
  * [Remove a User from Projects in Your Company's Procore Account](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/directory-company/tutorials/remove-an-existing-user-from-projects-in-your-companys-procore-account)
  * [Add a User to Future Projects in Your Company Directory](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/directory-company/tutorials/add-a-user-to-future-projects-in-your-company-directory)
  * [What granular permissions are available for the Company level Directory tool?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-granular-permissions-are-available-for-the-company-level-directory-tool)
title: Add a User to Projects in Your Company's Procore Account
description: How to add an existing user to one or more projects in the Company level Directory tool.
